name: Citrus Dumplings
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1-quart casserole, stir together orange juice, cornstarch and 1/4 teaspoon ground cinnamon. Cook on high power for 1 to 2 minutes or until thickened and bubbly, stirring every 30 seconds.
2. Stir in drained mandarin orange sections and finely shredded orange peel. Continue cooking uncovered on high power for 1 to 1.5 minutes or until heated through.
3. Meanwhile, stir together Bisquick and 2 tablespoons sugar. Add milk, stirring just until moistened.
4. Drop the mixture into four mounds atop the hot orange mixture.
5. Cook uncovered at low power for 6 to 7 minutes or until dumplings are set.
6. Stir together 1 tablespoon sugar and a dash of ground cinnamon. Sprinkle over the dumplings.
